Registry / Terms / metrologically relevant

metrologically relevant

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00341 · 10 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 6 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 21:2007
#00341
2.1.4
any device, instrument, function or software (of a taximeter) that influences the measurement result or any other primary indication is considered as metrologically relevant
pending
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01322
T.1.8
any device, instrument, function or software of an instrument that influences the weighing result or any other primary indication is considered as metrologically relevant
pending
20102006OIML R 51-1:2006
#00576
T.1.11
any device, module, part, component, function or software of a weighing instrument that influences the weighing result or any other primary indication is considered as metrologically relevant
pending
20102006OIML R 76-1:2006
#00939
T.2.9
any device, module, part, component or function of a weighing instrument that may influence the weighing result or any other primary indication is considered as metrologically relevant
pending
202X2020OIML R150-1:2020
#03298
2.1.7
attribute of any devoice, intrumnet, function or software that may influence the measurement result or any other primary indication [VIML:2013, 4.03]
pending
202X2011OIML R106-1:2011
#02535
0.1.14
any device, instrument, function or software of an instrument that influences the measurement result or any other primary indication is considered to be metrologically relevant
pending

#00341
2.1.4
any device, instrument, function or software (of a taximeter) that influences the measurement result or any other primary indication is considered as metrologically relevant
pending

any device, instrument, function or software of an instrument that influences the weighing result or any other primary indication is considered as metrologically relevant
